examples: He was tucking into a huge plateful of pasta.
A plateful of coarse broken victuals was set before him.
The hungry boys polished off a plateful of ham and then asked for more.
And yet, as eaters of bubble-and-squeak sometimes find, another plateful is often just too tempting.
She offered him a plateful of everything, but failed to catch his eye, Shawn having developed a habit of speaking to the floor.
